untranslatable_reason: Signal requires candlestick pattern detection (Dark Cloud Cover), candle height measurement, shadow analysis, and measure rule calculations that cannot be expressed with primitive price/indicator conditions. Specifically: (1) Pattern shape recognition (two-candle configuration); (2) Candle body height calculation and percentage-based targeting; (3) Upper/lower wick ratio analysis vs. median comparison; (4) Measure rule price projection formula. These require pattern recognition logic beyond the allowed operators and indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture core SHORT entry in bull market with downward close, but full Dark Cloud Cover pattern requires candlestick pattern recognition unavailable in the allowed indicator set. The 1.9% stop_loss_pct reflects the failure rate cited in source material.
